name: ObjectLinetypeSource
summary: Defines enumerated values for the source of linetype of single objects.

enum_values.name: LinetypeFromLayer
enum_values.summary: use line style assigned to layer.

enum_values.name: LinetypeFromObject
enum_values.summary: use line style assigned to object.

enum_values.name: LinetypeFromParent
enum_values.summary: for objects with parents (like objects in instance references, use parent linetype) if not parent, treat as linetype_from_layer.
